pageContext.name: Harley Quinn
pageContext.description: I'm rubber, you're glue, whatever you say bounces off me and makes a six-inch diameter exit wound in you.   Sideshow and Tweeterhead present the Harley Quinn 1:4 Scale Maquette, a playful addition to your DC Comics collection.  Harley Quinn is fresh out of Arkham Asylum and ready to create chaos once more in simpering statue form! This Clown Princess of Crime wields her signature oversized mallet while she strikes a flirtatious pose, pointed feet kicking high into the Gotham sky. She measures 22.75 from her base to the tip of her raised foot, and 18 wide from that foot to the tip of her hammer.  Clad in her cap 'n' bells mask and her classic black, white, and red bodysuit, Harley Quinn sits atop a stack of building blocks that are decorated with jester faces and playing card suits as well as three letters spelling MR. J. Daintily decorated bombs, bags of money, wads of cash, and blue and red rollerskate wheels adorn Harley's play area. This lively lady is also joined by two plush dolls of The Joker and his ripped-apart rival, Batman!  This fully sculpted polyresin Harley Quinn Statue includes two swap-out portraits. Collectors can display Harley with her clownish cowl, or with her bright blonde hair flowing freely in two wavy pigtails. No matter which portrait you choose, Harley Quinn is always smiling with a pearly white grin plastered on her painted face. Keep her entertained when you pair her with The Joker Deluxe 1:6 Scale Maquette by Tweeterhead — sold separately.  Hurry, Puddin'! Don't miss your chance to add the Harley Quinn 1:4 Scale Maquette by Tweeterhead to your collection today!
